name: brain-engineering-os
description: v2 (clean-room rebuild). AI engineering team delivered as a Claude Code plugin that builds Brain — the AI-native commerce OS for DTC brands (India-first; UAE/GCC sequenced). 11 agents through an 8-stage requirement-to-release pipeline, grounded in the Brain canon. v2 leans the runtime: control-flow in pipeline/ (not the Opus prompt), delta re-review, model tiering, lazy skill loading, single-sourced canon, enforced telemetry. Shared memory lives in the consuming repo's .engineering-os/ (committed to git).
